overview: Bioidentical Hormones NYC is a physician-led functional medicine clinic specializing in hormone optimization through BHRT, TRT, and related therapies. Care combines advanced diagnostic testing with personalized treatment plans, available both in-person in Manhattan and via telemedicine across NY, NJ, and CT.
targetAudience: Adults in high-stress environments experiencing hormonal imbalance, fatigue, or metabolic issues who seek comprehensive, root-cause-focused care.
